name: Giant Chocolate Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together the flour, salt, and baking soda.
2. In a large bowl, cream the butter until fluffy. Gradually beat in the white sugar. Add the egg and vanilla, beating until fluffy.
3. Stir in the flour mixture and chocolate chips.
4. Shape the dough into 1 to 2 inch balls and place them about 3 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350 degrees F for 25-30 minutes on the middle rack.
6. Cool the cookies directly on the baking sheet.
Makes about 18 cookies
== Courtesy of Dale & Gail Shipp, Columbia Md. ==
